title: Seq2048 + torch.compile + mid LR (1xA100 draft)
body:
This is a draft non-record submission based on single-A100 experiments.

Current best run:
- experiment: seq2048_compile_midlr_v5
- final_val_bpb: 1.35557361
- bytes_total: 14840173
- gpu: 1xA100

This PR adds only the submission folder under `records/track_non_record_16mb/`.
